summary: Tested new features: SessionCountdownWidget, LineupManagerDrawer redesign, and ScheduledBookingDrawer payment method selection. All features working correctly.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All new features tested and working: (1) SessionCountdownWidget shows on Feed with live countdown timer and 'View Session Details' button, (2) LineupManagerDrawer has surf-themed visual with PEAK/SHORE labels, captain at top, crew below, empty seats as surfboard silhouettes with 'Open #N' labels, Quick Actions panel with Lock/Close/Cancel buttons, and Lineup/Invite tabs, (3) ScheduledBookingDrawer payment step shows 'Choose Payment Method' with 'Pay with Card' option - 'Pay with Account Credits' option correctly hidden when user has $0 credits (conditional rendering working as designed).

details: Widget displays on Feed after login
Shows 'Upcoming Sessions' header with session count
Displays session details: location, date/time, photographer name
Live countdown timer showing days and hours
'View Session Details' button present with chevron icon
'The Lineup' title visible at top
PEAK label at top of visual lineup
SHORE label at bottom of visual lineup
Captain (You) at top with 'In Position' badge and crown indicator
Crew members below captain with status badges
Empty seats shown as surfboard silhouettes with 'Open #N' labels and dashed borders
Tabs: 'Lineup (N)' and 'Invite (N open)' present
Quick Actions panel with 'Lock Lineup & Confirm Session' (green), 'Close to New', 'Cancel & Refund' buttons
Quick Fill section with Auto-Suggest badge for friends
Auto-locking countdown timer visible
'Choose Payment Method' header visible
'Pay with Card' option with 'Secure checkout via Stripe' description
Session Summary showing Date & Time, Duration, Location, Total Session Cost
Amount Due and Card Charge displayed
Payment Protected notice present
Cancellation policy displayed
'Pay with Account Credits' option correctly hidden when user has $0 credits (conditional rendering working as designed)
Code review confirms: Credits option only shows when userCredits > 0 (line 1341)
